```lean
theorem candidate_T1_free (Ōá : Character G) (hŌá : Ōá ‚Č† 1) :
    ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
  classical
  by_contra hsum
  have hsum' : (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) ‚Č† 0 := by simpa using hsum
  obtain ‚ü®g0, hg0‚ü© : ‚ąÉ g0 : G, Ōá g0 ‚Č† 1 := by
    by_contra h
    apply hŌá
    ext g
    by_contra hg
    exact h ‚ü®g, hg‚ü©
  have hmul : (Ōá g0 : ‚Ąā) * (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
    calc
      (Ōá g0 : ‚Ąā) * (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā))
          = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá g0 : ‚Ąā) * (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
              simpa [mul_sum]
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá (g0 * g) : ‚Ąā) := by
            refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
            intro g hg
            simpa using map_mul Ōá g0 g
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
            exact Finset.sum_bijective (fun g => g0 * g) (by intro g; simp) (by intro g; simp) (by intro a b h; simpa [mul_left_cancel‚āÄ] using h) (by intro g; refine ‚ü®g0‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * g, by simp‚ü©)
  have : (Ōá g0 : ‚Ąā) = 1 := by
    apply mul_right_cancel‚āÄ hsum'
    simpa [hmul]
  exact hg0 (by exact_mod_cast this)
```

Location: ATP.temTH.CandidateTheorems.T1.Free:candidate_T1_free

Code:
```lean
theorem candidate_T1_free (Ōá : Character G) (hŌá : Ōá ‚Č† 1) :
    ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
  classical
  by_contra hsum
  have hsum' : (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) ‚Č† 0 := by simpa using hsum
  obtain ‚ü®g0, hg0‚ü© : ‚ąÉ g0 : G, Ōá g0 ‚Č† 1 := by
    by_contra h
    apply hŌá
    ext g
    by_contra hg
    exact h ‚ü®g, hg‚ü©
  have hmul : (Ōá g0 : ‚Ąā) * (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
    calc
      (Ōá g0 : ‚Ąā) * (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā))
          = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá g0 : ‚Ąā) * (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
              simpa using Finset.mul_sum (Ōá g0 : ‚Ąā) (fun g : G => (Ōá g : ‚Ąā))
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá (g0 * g) : ‚Ąā) := by
            refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
            intro g hg
            simpa using map_mul Ōá g0 g
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
            simpa using Fintype.sum_bijective (fun g : G => g0 * g) (by
              intro a b h
              exact mul_left_cancel h) (by
              intro g
              refine ‚ü®g0‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * g, ?_‚ü©
              simp)
  have hchiC : (Ōá g0 : ‚Ąā) = 1 := by
    apply mul_right_cancel‚āÄ hsum'
    simpa [hmul]
  have hchi : Ōá g0 = 1 := by
    exact Subtype.ext (by simpa using hchiC)
  exact hg0 hchi
```
